postCreateCommand.system: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y iptables ipset dnsutils aggregate && sudo ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.devcontainer/init-firewall.sh
postCreateCommand.python: pip install uv && uv tool install llm && llm install llm-github-models llm-anthropic llm-gemini && llm models default github/gpt-4.1
